title: Basic JavaScript WebSockets
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript WebSockets. Focus on implementing WebSocket API correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript WebSockets
description: Create a function that uses WebSocket API and Socket.IO library together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript WebSockets Project
description: Build a small application that applies WebSocket API, Socket.IO library, Message handling (send/receive) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript WebSockets
description: The following code has bugs related to WebSocket API. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript WebSockets
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with WebSocket API and Socket.IO library.
